title: Roast German Amaranth
description: This fresh and dense dish features roasted amaranth mixed with saffron, a midnight-craving german plant-based delight.
instructions: Rinse amaranth under cold water and drain well.
In a large pot or saucepan, combine amaranth with water or broth. Bring to a boil over medium heat.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer until liquid is absorbed and the amaranth is tender, about 15-20 minutes.
While the amaranth cooks, soak saffron threads in hot water for at least 10 minutes. Strain into a small bowl and set aside.
In a separate pan, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add saffron-infused liquid from amaranth to the pan and let it simmer until slightly reduced but still clear, about 5-7 minutes.
Fold in the cooked amaranth and adjust seasoning with salt if needed.
Serve hot as a side dish or as a main course.
